  • Method Details

    • createHistoryQuotesAndSave

      public Security createHistoryQuotesAndSave(ISecuritycurrencyService<Security> securitycurrencyService, Security security, LocalDate fromDate, LocalDate toDate)
      Description copied from interface: IHistoryquoteLoad
      Retrieves and persists historical quotes for a security or currency pair within a specified time period.

      Important: This operation may take considerable time. The security or currency pair should not be modified by other threads during execution. All retrieved data is persisted to the database.

      Parameters:
      securitycurrencyService - service for managing the security or currency pair
      security - the security or currency pair to update
      fromDate - start date for historical data (null = use global parameter default)
      toDate - end date for historical data (null = use current date)
      Returns:
      the updated security or currency pair with persisted historical quotes

    • fillEmptyHistoryquote

      protected List<Security> fillEmptyHistoryquote()
      Specified by:
      fillEmptyHistoryquote in class BaseHistoryquoteThru<Security>

    • getSecuritycurrencyHistoricalDownloadLinkAsUrlStr

      public String getSecuritycurrencyHistoricalDownloadLinkAsUrlStr(Security securitycurrency)
      Description copied from interface: IHistoryquoteLoad
      Generates a download link URL for historical data of a security or currency pair.
      Parameters:
      securitycurrency - the security or currency pair
      Returns:
      URL string for downloading historical data

    • getHistoryquoteQualityHead

      public HistoryquoteQualityHead getHistoryquoteQualityHead(HistoryquoteQualityGrouped groupedBy, SecurityJpaRepository securityJpaRepository, org.springframework.context.MessageSource messages)
      Description copied from interface: IHistoryquoteLoad
      Retrieves quality metrics for historical quote data grouped by specified criteria.
      Parameters:
      groupedBy - the grouping criteria for quality assessment
      securityJpaRepository - repository for accessing security data
      messages - message source for internationalization
      Returns:
      quality assessment header with aggregated metrics

    • createDownloadLink

      public String createDownloadLink(Security securitycurrency, IFeedConnector feedConnector)
      Description copied from interface: IHistoryquoteLoad
      Creates a download link for a security using a specific feed connector.
      Parameters:
      securitycurrency - the security or currency pair
      feedConnector - the feed connector to use for generating the link
      Returns:
      download link as string
